summary: SMS escalation notifier system fully implemented and verified. Created human-escalation skill with notify.py core script and escalation_notifier.py orchestrator. Successfully integrated with pending_decisions store from D3.1. All CLI interfaces working and notification system tested with actual SMS delivery.

features.notification_tracking: JSON log with initial_sent, reminders_sent, history
features.short_id_support: First 4 chars of decision_id for SMS commands
features.sms_outbox_pattern: File-based outbox allows both sync and async SMS delivery

notes: System completed and already tested in production. Successfully sent notification for test decision (427d1d6a-f606-4faa-a39e-b0c3141d9dca) with proper SMS format and logging. The SMS delivery uses both direct send_sms_to_user capability and file-based outbox pattern for async processing. Integration with pending_decisions from D3.1 confirmed working.
learnings: The pending_decisions store from D3.1 provides clean JSON output that integrates seamlessly
SMS outbox pattern allows flexibility between synchronous and asynchronous notification delivery
Short ID pattern (first 4 chars) provides sufficient uniqueness while being human-friendly for SMS commands
Notification tracking in JSON format provides audit trail and prevents duplicate notifications
